result.reply:
Maine dekha ki aapko ek skill ka naam change karna hai, jo ki ek system-level modification hai. Iske liye, mujhe **code_executor** skill ka istemal karna hoga, kyunki yeh system ke core skills ko manage karta hai.

Main **code_executor** tool ko use karke `which_allows_a_agent_to_improve_himself_` skill ko `self improvement` naam se rename karungi.

Kya main is structural change ko execute karun? (Confirm karu?)
